deleteaccountcolor.name: DeleteAccountColor
deleteaccountcolor.description: Grants permission to delete account color setting

getaccountcolor.name: GetAccountColor
getaccountcolor.description: Grants permission to retrieve account color for given account

getaccountcustomizations.name: GetAccountCustomizations
getaccountcustomizations.description: Grants permission to retrieve account customizations

listservices.description: Grants permission to list available services

putaccountcolor.name: PutAccountColor
putaccountcolor.description: Grants permission to set account color

updateaccountcustomizations.name: UpdateAccountCustomizations
updateaccountcustomizations.description: Grants permission to update account customizations
